prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; structured assessment with access to ERP therapy in many systems

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with ERP and SSRIs; varies by country

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Specialist pathways and psychotherapy access common in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: ERP-focused CBT and SSRIs; specialist augmentation strategies when refractory
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for ERP in some systems
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad availability of evidence-based psychotherapy in many countries
